config.name: Treasury Stability: Reserve Deployment Policy
config.hypothesis: An intermediate treasury overflow threshold (0.30-0.50) maximizes population stability and minimizes inequality, while extremes — aggressive deployment or passive hoarding — degrade outcomes

findings: Treasury ratio: 0.0057 at aggressive deployment (0.10) vs 0.0073 at hoarding (0.90) (+27.3%)
Peak population stability at overflow_threshold = 0.10 (mean pop: 49.4)
Gini coefficient: 0.5552 at deployment (0.10) vs 0.5502 at hoarding (0.90) (-0.9%)
No collapses observed across entire threshold range
Mean fitness: 0.5518 at aggressive deployment vs 0.5406 at hoarding
Population volatility: 6.81 at deployment vs 6.88 at hoarding
Birth/death ratio: 1.0624 at deployment vs 1.1177 at hoarding
